instructions.message: Extract YouTube/TikTok transcripts when URLs are provided in chat, log to dashboard
YouTube: Use youtube-transcript npm package (API, NO browser). Fast (1-2s), accurate, serverless-compatible
TikTok: Use yt-dlp + Whisper CLI (download + AI transcription). Slower (30-60s) but only working method
DO NOT use browser automation for YouTube - abandoned method. npm package is primary
CHAT-FIRST WORKFLOW - User pastes link in chat → Extract immediately → Provide transcript in chat → Log to dashboard JSON. Do NOT wait for user to ask
LOG EVERY TRANSCRIPT - Save every extracted transcript to data/transcripts.json with: id, url, title, author, duration, platform, transcript text, timestamp, language, segments count
LANGUAGE DETECTION - Whisper auto-detects language. Record detected language in transcript metadata. For non-English, note it in the transcript
ERROR HANDLING - If video unavailable/no captions, tell user immediately with specific error (e.g., 'Video deleted', 'No captions enabled'). Don't retry endlessly

developments.message: Initial transcript extractor created with browser automation
Extracted: Steve Wozniak interview on AI (Apple 50th anniversary) - 349 segments
Converted to read-only log - input field removed, chat-based workflow
Uses youtube-transcript npm package (Vercel serverless compatible)
Added TikTok transcription support via Whisper (audio extraction + STT)
Extracted: TikTok video 'Make the Right Decision' - 24s, 2 segments
Extracted: TikTok 'Importante magkaroon ng mayaman na kaibigan' (@victoranastacio) - 35s, Tagalog, 18 segments

insights.message: User prefers pasting links in chat vs using UI input field - cleaner workflow
Chat-first workflow: User pastes link → I extract → I provide transcript here → I log to dashboard JSON

brainstorming.message: Could add TikTok transcript extraction in future (would need different API)
